problem id: 413086bc
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  10011010 -> 00110110
  00100111 -> 01001110
  11011111 -> 10111101
  11010100 -> 10101011
  01010001 -> 10100011
  01011111 -> 10111111
  11001011 -> 10010101
  00110110 -> 01101100
  11100011 -> 11000101
  01101011 -> 11010111

query: 01011001
predicted answer: 10110011
